title: AAP Agent Identity Token claim set (AAP-SPEC section 3.2)
description: Claims of the AIT, an OIDC-ID-Token-analog JWT asserting agent identity. Issued by a Registry (Root Authority); `iss` is the issuing authority DID, `sub` the agent DID, `atx_reference` the sha256 of the current ATX the token references. Unknown members are optional-to-ignore (AAP-SPEC section 8.3). No reference implementation mints AITs yet; this schema and the generated example pin the form for implementers.
